tools.name: callback.integrationsCallbackGenerateToken
tools.description: Receives the auth code and auth config id to combine that with the client id and secret to retrieve access tokens from the token endpoint. Returns either a success or error message when it's done.

tools.name: connectorPlatformRegions.integrationsConnectorPlatformRegionsEnumerate
tools.description: Enumerates the regions for which Connector Platform is provisioned.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsAppsScriptProjectsCreate
tools.description: Creates an Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsAppsScriptProjectsLink
tools.description: Links a existing Apps Script project.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsConnectionsList
tools.description: Lists Connections in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsConnectionsRuntimeActionSchemasList
tools.description: Lists the JSON schemas for the inputs and outputs of actions, filtered by action name.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsConnectionsRuntimeEntitySchemasList
tools.description: Lists the JSON schemas for the properties of runtime entities, filtered by entity name.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsAuthConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates an auth config record. Fetch corresponding credentials for specific auth types, e.g. access token for OAuth 2.0, JWT token for JWT. Encrypt the auth config with Cloud KMS and store the encrypted credentials in Spanner. Returns the encrypted auth config.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsAuthConfigsList
tools.description: Lists all auth configs that match the filter. Restrict to auth configs belong to the current client only.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsCertificatesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new certificate. The certificate will be registered to the trawler service and will be encrypted using cloud KMS and stored in Spanner Returns the certificate.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsCertificatesList
tools.description: List all the certificates that match the filter. Restrict to certificate of current client only.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsExecute
tools.description: Executes integrations synchronously by passing the trigger id in the request body. The request is not returned until the requested executions are either fulfilled or experienced an error. If the integration name is not specified (passing `-`), all of the associated integration under the given trigger_id will be executed. Otherwise only the specified integration for the given `trigger_id` is executed. This is helpful for execution the integration from UI.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsExecutionsCancel
tools.description: Cancellation of an execution

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsExecutionsList
tools.description: Lists the results of all the integration executions. The response includes the same information as the [execution log](https://cloud.google.com/application-integration/docs/viewing-logs) in the Integration UI.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsExecutionsSuspensionsLift
tools.description: * Lifts suspension for advanced suspension task. Fetch corresponding suspension with provided suspension Id, resolve suspension, and set up suspension result for the Suspension Task.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsExecutionsSuspensionsList
tools.description: * Lists suspensions associated with a specific execution. Only those with permissions to resolve the relevant suspensions will be able to view them.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsExecutionsSuspensionsResolve
tools.description: * Resolves (lifts/rejects) any number of suspensions. If the integration is already running, only the status of the suspension is updated. Otherwise, the suspended integration will begin execution again.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all integrations in the specified project.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsSchedule
tools.description: Schedules an integration for execution by passing the trigger id and the scheduled time in the request body.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsVersionsDownload
tools.description: Downloads an integration. Retrieves the `IntegrationVersion` for a given `integration_id` and returns the response as a string.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsVersionsPublish
tools.description: This RPC throws an exception if the integration is in ARCHIVED or ACTIVE state. This RPC throws an exception if the version being published is DRAFT, and if the `locked_by` user is not the same as the user performing the Publish. Audit fields updated include last_published_timestamp, last_published_by, last_modified_timestamp, last_modified_by. Any existing lock is on this integration is released.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsVersionsTakeoverEditLock
tools.description: Clears the `locked_by` and `locked_at_timestamp`in the DRAFT version of this integration. It then performs the same action as the CreateDraftIntegrationVersion (i.e., copies the DRAFT version of the integration as a SNAPSHOT and then creates a new DRAFT version with the `locked_by` set to the `user_taking_over` and the `locked_at_timestamp` set to the current timestamp). Both the `locked_by` and `user_taking_over` are notified via email about the takeover. This RPC throws an exception if the integration is not in DRAFT status or if the `locked_by` and `locked_at_timestamp` fields are not set.The TakeoverEdit lock is treated the same as an edit of the integration, and hence shares ACLs with edit. Audit fields updated include last_modified_timestamp, last_modified_by.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsVersionsUnpublish
tools.description: Sets the status of the ACTIVE integration to SNAPSHOT with a new tag "PREVIOUSLY_PUBLISHED" after validating it. The "HEAD" and "PUBLISH_REQUESTED" tags do not change. This RPC throws an exception if the version being snapshot is not ACTIVE. Audit fields added include action, action_by, action_timestamp.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationsVersionsUpload
tools.description: Uploads an integration. The content can be a previously downloaded integration. Performs the same function as CreateDraftIntegrationVersion, but accepts input in a string format, which holds the complete representation of the IntegrationVersion content.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationtemplatesVersionsCreate
tools.description: Creates an IntegrationTemplateVersion.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsProductsIntegrationtemplatesVersionsList
tools.description: Returns the list of all IntegrationTemplateVersions in the specified project.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesCreate
tools.description: Creates an sfdc instance record. Store the sfdc instance in Spanner. Returns the sfdc instance.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesList
tools.description: Lists all sfdc instances that match the filter. Restrict to sfdc instances belonging to the current client only.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesSfdcChannelsCreate
tools.description: Creates an sfdc channel record. Store the sfdc channel in Spanner. Returns the sfdc channel.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesSfdcChannelsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an sfdc channel.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesSfdcChannelsGet
tools.description: Gets an sfdc channel. If the channel doesn't exist, Code.NOT_FOUND exception will be thrown.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesSfdcChannelsList
tools.description: Lists all sfdc channels that match the filter. Restrict to sfdc channels belonging to the current client only.

tools.name: projects.integrationsProjectsLocationsSfdcInstancesSfdcChannelsPatch
tools.description: Updates an sfdc channel. Updates the sfdc channel in spanner. Returns the sfdc channel.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
